ques: Check out Denver International Airport's information and tell me: 1) which level has the least proportion in reviews; 2) what are its Accessibility and Amenities.
answer: 1) The review-score breakdown (per-star histogram) is not available in this signed-out "limited view" of Google Maps — only the overall 4.1★ rating is shown — so the level with the least proportion of reviews cannot be determined from the page. 2) Accessibility: Assistive hearing loop, Wheelchair accessible entrance, Wheelchair accessible parking lot, Wheelchair accessible restroom, Wheelchair accessible seating. Amenities: none listed (the About section provides only the Accessibility category for this place).
